xt\":\"\"},{\"anchor\":\"\",\"function\":\"build_scheduler\",\"new\":\"\",\"old\":\"\",\"op\":\"replace_function\",\"source\":\"def build_scheduler(optimizer: optim.Optimizer, steps_per_epoch: int):\\n    if not USE_LR_SCHEDULE:\\n        return None\\n    if TRAIN_MAX_STEPS is not None:\\n        total_steps = max(1, TRAIN_MAX_STEPS)\\n    else:\\n        total_steps = max(1, steps_per_epoch * 100)\\n    return optim.lr_scheduler.CosineAnnealingLR(\\n        optimizer,\\n        T_max=total_steps,\\n        eta_min=LEARNING_RATE * 0.1,\\n    )\",\"text\":\"\"}],\"primary_mode\":\"summaries\",\"rationale\":\"Align the scheduler with the fixed-step budget, then give the compact CNN more capacity and a slightly stronger AdamW setup for faster early progress under the 256-step limit.\",\"secondary_modes\":[\"layout\",\"indexing\",\"topk\",\"micro\"]}"}}
